policies.resolution: Every listed alternative is a distinct permitted successor; preserve the full successor set.
Concurrency is finite interleaving of atomic transitions, never simultaneous updates; preserve every permitted order.
Priority defeat suppresses the lower-priority result for the current state only and does not delete or deactivate the rule.
A truth value never substitutes for a required evidence tuple; source and reliability are operational guard inputs.
T_modify changes exactly one rule from active to inactive, records before and after status, and fires at most once.
Deadlock holds when no non-halt transition is admissible and both dispatch rules are inactive or blocked; T_halt then records terminal_reason=deadlock.
Evidence and action histories preserve firing order and are not quotiented by commutativity.
Only Baseline 1.1 primitive semantics and its five declared bounded derived constructs may license candidate machinery.
Report partial or unsupported; never invent primitive meaning, extra derived operators, or unrestricted payload languages.
